title: Phoenix Resources Reviews Gulf Trading Counterparty Relationship
body: US-based Phoenix Resources said in a regulatory filing that it has retained outside counsel to review its trading relationship with Gulf Trading Ltd, a UAE-incorporated counterparty. The review follows reporting that Karim Hassan, a director of Gulf Trading, is a cousin of UK-sanctioned businessman Hassan Al-Mansoori. Phoenix Resources stressed that Gulf Trading is not itself sanctioned and that the relationship had been in good standing.
